title: Create: Elitia Addon
description: Elitia is a mod that allows you to automate minecraft's most popular resources, using create mod
body:
# CREATE ELITIA ADDON

Elitia is an addon for the famous **Create Mod**, that allows you to automate vanilla resources like diamonds, coal and more.

The recipes are using the create assembly mechanisms, bulk washing systems & more.
All recipes are as realistic as possible and the difficulty to produce resources depends on the rarity of it.

## Elitia adds:

• Elitium - A new rare metal which can be used as a currency

• Diamond automation

• Coal automation

• Amethyst automation

• Copper automation

• Netherrack automation

• Redstone automation

### And more!
